name: Veeam Backup & Replication
description: Monitor Veeam Backup & Replication for backup job status, backup sessions, repository health, and infrastructure inventory for compliance

credentialFields.label: Server URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Veeam B&R server URL (e.g., https://veeam.company.com:9419)

checks.name: Backup logs
checks.description: Monitors backup job status and ensures jobs are running successfully

checks.name: Backup Restoration Test
checks.description: Reviews recent backup sessions to verify backup completion and success rates

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Monitors backup repository status and storage capacity for infrastructure compliance
